name: Shadow Combat
description: BECOME THE SHADOW FIGHT HERO IN A NEW MULTIPLAYER FIGHTING GAME! Fight against other players in a free online 3D fighting game. Compete in 2 player PVP combats or brawl for fun with friends or play offline against smart bots. Welcome to the ninja realm! Best Mobile Game of 2020 (DevGAMM Awards): Shadow Fight Combat, Immersive 3D graphics The games realistic 3D graphics and animations immerse you right into the epic combat action. Control your hero like in the best classical fighting games and get a console-level battle experience on your mobile device. PvE story mode Fight against AI opponents in a story mode.
instructions: Move WASD Fight Attacks Y U I G H J K T similar to Tekken-style combos
